Green Thinking

Unlearning Outdated Ideas in Science, Economics and Politics

“A powerful and timely call to rethink how we understand progress, knowledge and our place in the natural world. Written with clarity, courage and hope, Green Thinking challenges assumptions and inspires new ways of seeing the future.” Peter Frankopan

Find out about this book

Change Everything

setting out Green political philosophy

‘Every so often, a book comes along that articulates exactly what our country needs. This is one. Essential reading’ Zack Polanski

Find out about this book

#IndustrialAgriculture – so many costs

“Contamination is also the result of a historical accumulation that should lead us to more broadly rethink intensive, monoculture-based agriculture”

‘Public health time bomb’: How France allowed cadmium to poison its crops and soil

French residents are three to four times more likely to register unsafe levels of cadmium in their bodies than t…

www.france24.com

Natalie Bennett @natalieben ·
17h 2050606415257952371

Useful reflection: “in treating human innovation as solution to all humanity’s problems, it fails to acknowledge that many of those problems exist because of human inventions, not (as in Project Hail Mary) light-eating space microbes”

‘Project Hail Mary’ and the Politics of Science Fiction

Even the most entertaining tale carries a political message.

foreignpolicy.com

Extending nationally significant infrastructure status to more projects risks shielding damaging developments from proper scrutiny.

The Wirral Peak cluster CCS project could cause immense environmental harm. It should not be protected in this way.

25 2
Open post by nataliebennettgreen with ID 18342054601301309

Extending nationally significant infrastructure status to more projects risks shielding damaging developments from proper scrutiny.

The Wirral Peak cluster CCS project could cause immense environmental harm. It should not be protected in this way. …

25 2

Cabinet or Committee system in local government? I don’t mind what the government prefers. I mind it being imposed on communities up and down the country.
This is about real democracy – let communities decide.

#Democracy #Devolution

22 2
Open post by nataliebennettgreen with ID 18123164935553165

Cabinet or Committee system in local government? I don’t mind what the government prefers. I mind it being imposed on communities up and down the country.
This is about real democracy – let communities decide.

#Democracy #Devolution …

22 2

When poison designed for rodents is turning up in birds of prey and mammals across the country, it shows the scale of environmental damage we are causing.

We need urgent action to monitor, regulate and phase out these harmful substances before the damage goes further.

#Wildlife #EnvironmentalProtection

40 3
Open post by nataliebennettgreen with ID 17856294594650038

When poison designed for rodents is turning up in birds of prey and mammals across the country, it shows the scale of environmental damage we are causing.

We need urgent action to monitor, regulate and phase out these harmful substances before the damage goes further.

#Wildlife #EnvironmentalProtection …

In the House of Lords

Read News

About Natalie

Find Out About Natalie

I was sworn in as a member of the House of Lords on October 15, 2019, having been nominated to join Jenny Jones as the Green Party’s second peer. That followed a call from the Lord Speaker’s Commission for us to have more representation, reflecting the electoral success of the party.
